CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-21-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2005 Continued To Apr-11-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
LENORA ROLAND TAYLOR, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Jason Gaffney
JOHN ARTHUR SHUPE, Esq. on behalf of defendant West Valley-Mission Community College District

This matter had a conditional settlement with Judge Pro Tem Lee Harris. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant West Valley-Mission Community College District to pay plaintiff Jason Gaffney the sum of $59,950.00 conditional upon Kaiser reduceing its lien to $5,000.00 or less, and defendant's self insurance board's approval. Each side to bear own attorney fees and costs, along with the standard CC 1542 waiver. Matter continued to April 11, 2005 for settlement protected date.

Judge Pro Tem: Lee Harris; Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Christine Paxton #1558 (206)
